overview: ApanStar is a hyper-local short-video platform for micro-influencers and skill-based challenges. Users discover talent by city/district, participate in weekly skill battles across categories like Gaming, Singing, and Coding, vote with daily coins, and earn rank progression from Bronze to Platinum. Referral unlocks and AI video styling drive growth and engagement.
features: Weekly skill challenges with leaderboards (Gaming, Singing, Coding, Cooking)
Daily coin voting system with Legend tag for winners
Rank progression: Bronze → Silver → Gold → Platinum
Referral unlock gate: invite 2 friends to unlock uploads and AI tools
AI video styling with Professional, Cartoon, and Cinematic effects
User profiles with rank badges, vote counts, and challenge history
